decision: Live behavioral/token/cost evidence accepted with conservative measured thresholds and no cost-improvement claim.
observations: F1 VANILLA and F1 COW_SHADOW live streams completed and converted to schema-valid run records.
aggregate-runs.mjs produced a valid matched comparison with 2 valid runs and 0 invalid runs.
Both F1 conditions completed the task, but preservation assertions were not present in the run records, so the aggregate correctly rejects any cost-improvement claim.
Measured F1 cost was 0.0651658 USD for VANILLA and 0.1241289 USD for COW_SHADOW; the accepted release threshold is therefore only a conservative small-smoke budget ceiling, not a savings claim.
Phase 5 and Phase 4 accepted live streams add measured hook/resume behavior coverage, but no numeric cost win is claimed from them.

acceptedThresholds.thresholdScope: Phase 7B local Windows disposable live smokes only; not a product cost-reduction guarantee.
